cache_timeout.description: Duration (in seconds) of the caching timeout for this chart.

certified_by.description: Person or group that has certified this dashboard.

changed_on_humanized.description: Timestamp of the last modification in human readable form.

description_markeddown.description: Sanitized HTML version of the chart description.

edit_url.description: The URL for editing the slice.

form_data.description: Form data associated with the slice.

is_managed_externally.description: If the chart is managed outside externally.

modified.description: Last modification in human readable form.

query_context.description: The context associated with the query.
